languages.original_text: "My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

languages.text: "Мое сердце радуется, когда видит служителей Бога-Императора, что несут хвалу Ему через верную службу. Но я не увидела среди собравшихся на шествие простых людей... Неужели им не нашлось места?"

"My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

"My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

"My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

languages.text: 「神皇帝の御臣が忠誠を尽くして御神を称える姿は、私の心を高揚させます。しかし、行列に集まった人々の中に、一般の人々はいませんでした。彼らも含まれていなかったのでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝の御臣が忠誠を尽くして御神を称える姿は、私の心を高揚させます。しかし、行列に集まった人々の中に、一般の人々はいませんでした。彼らも含まれていなかったのでしょうか？」

languages.text: « Qu'il est exaltant de voir les serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu Lui rendre grâce à travers leur travail assidu ! Cependant, je ne peux que remarquer l'absence de gens du commun parmi ceux qui se sont rassemblés pour la procession... Se pourrait-il qu'ils n'aient pas été conviés ? »
languages.original_text: "My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

traits.locale_text: « Qu'il est exaltant de voir les serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu Lui rendre grâce à travers leur travail assidu ! Cependant, je ne peux que remarquer l'absence de gens du commun parmi ceux qui se sont rassemblés pour la procession... Se pourrait-il qu'ils n'aient pas été conviés ? »

languages.text: "Mein Herz frohlockt beim Anblick der Untertanen des Gottimperators, die Ihn durch treue Dienste preisen. Aber ich sah im Vorfeld der Prozession keine einfachen Leute ... Wurden sie am Ende nicht eingeladen?"
languages.original_text: "My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

traits.locale_text: "Mein Herz frohlockt beim Anblick der Untertanen des Gottimperators, die Ihn durch treue Dienste preisen. Aber ich sah im Vorfeld der Prozession keine einfachen Leute ... Wurden sie am Ende nicht eingeladen?"

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârlarının sadık hizmetle O'nu övdüğünü gördüğümde kalbim coşuyor. Fakat tören için toplananlar arasında hiç sıradan halktan birini görmedim... Onlar dâhil edilemez miydi?"
languages.original_text: "My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'un hizmetkârlarının sadık hizmetle O'nu övdüğünü gördüğümde kalbim coşuyor. Fakat tören için toplananlar arasında hiç sıradan halktan birini görmedim... Onlar dâhil edilemez miydi?"

languages.text: «Mi corazón se llena de gozo cuando contemplo la devoción de los siervos del Dios Emperador. Pero no he visto plebeyos entre los concurrentes a la procesión... ¿Acaso han sido excluidos?».
languages.original_text: "My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"

traits.locale_text: «Mi corazón se llena de gozo cuando contemplo la devoción de los siervos del Dios Emperador. Pero no he visto plebeyos entre los concurrentes a la procesión... ¿Acaso han sido excluidos?».

languages.text: “目睹神皇之仆以忠信侍奉赞颂祂，我的心便为之飞扬。但在仪仗队伍中，我没有看到平民的身影……难道不能让他们也加入吗？”
languages.original_text: "My heart soars when I behold the servants of the God-Emperor praising Him through faithful service. But I did not see any common folk among those gathered for the procession... Could they not have been included?"
